notes: Madden 26's HUD lives in a bottom band (y=1006-1080), not at the top as the original spec assumed. v1.0.0 of this file used spec-derived coords that did not align with real Madden 26 footage.
On kickoff/punt frames, the 'distance' bbox renders 'KICKOFF' / 'PUNT' / 'EXTRA POINT' instead of '& <yards>'. The bbox is stable; OCR pipeline state-classifies the result.

team_home is the LEFT-positioned team in the HUD (helmet + abbrev cluster on left of band). team_away is RIGHT-positioned. Whether 'home' equals the literal NFL home team depends on the broadcast — Madden's HUD always shows the away team's helmet on the left of NFL telecasts.

formation_overlay_pre_snap.appears: M4.5 deferred — Madden 26 in the calibration clip does not show a persistent pre-snap formation overlay. Real classifier in M5c reads from the on-field player layout instead. Bbox kept as a placeholder; do not OCR-read this region until M5c re-validates.
